creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
On, Mon Dec 02, 2013, Marcus von Appen wrote:

>
> It looks like the port requires OpenGL headers to compile successfully.
> It builds for me, when I add USE_GL=yes.
>
> Can you please check, if this is a required or optional dependency?
> Can you also add proper STAGEDIR support?
>

This port as well as ports/181244 (devel/ocl-id) are required for
ports/171914 (devel/pocl). Please let me know about the required changes
from above.

Thanks
Marcus
